bird.name: Nilgiri blue robin
bird.summary: The Nilgiri blue robin (Sholicola major), also known as Nilgiri shortwing, white-bellied shortwing, Nilgiri sholakili or rufous-bellied sho…

relations.subject: Nilgiri blue robin
relations.evidence: This small bird is found on the forest floor and undergrowth of dense forest patches sheltered in the valleys of montane grassland, a restricted and threatened habitat
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Nilgiri blue robin
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is forest patches in the valleys of high altitude grasslands known as sholas
